reviews.comment:
Re mal un playero en particular,  en el lugar de motos , me atendió muy mal en mi auto , deberían organizarce mejor y sobre todo atender mejor . Un desorden con esas motos .

(Translated by Google)
One attendant in particular, at the motorcycle station, was terrible. He treated me very badly in my car. They should be better organized and, above all, provide better service. It's a complete mess with those motorcycles.
